creator: freebsd.org@alexandrews.me.uk
text:
There is no wlanstats man page on the website.  In the "SEE ALSO" section for the wlandebug man page, it references wlanstats(8) but clicking the link takes you to:

https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=wlanstats&sektion=8&apropos=0&manpath=FreeBSD+11.0-RELEASE+and+Ports

which produces a page with the message:

"Sorry, no data found for `wlanstats(8)'."
